title: How to Take Smart Notes - Ahren Sonke
html:
#∆

Q: Why have a unambiguous method and place of taking notes is important? A: It saves you from the significant mental cost of decision making.

Q: "Write as if..." A: "...it is the only thing that matter.“"

Q: What mindset should it feels when writing slip-box notes? A: Playful

It's not only that you can't focus on than one thing at time, but also to have a different kind of attention on one more thing at a time.

What is my past misconception about writing?:: You have to know everything before the act of writing.
